cards.title: Create a Parenting Rota That Works
cards.body: A couple solved constant bickering over household duties by establishing a simple parenting system. This life-changing approach helped manage overwhelm when their second child was born in 2021.

cards.title: Managing In-Laws in Your Parenting
cards.body: When a partner's parent shows cruelty, it raises concerns about future grandparent relationships. Expert advice suggests minimizing contact unless there's genuine change.

cards.title: Sharenting: Pros and Cons Explained
cards.body: Parents commonly share photos and updates about their children online. Understanding the benefits and risks of sharenting helps protect family privacy.

cards.title: Child Expenses After Divorce
cards.body: Divorced or separated parents can discuss children's expenses constructively to avoid ongoing conflict. Practical communication prevents financial disputes from affecting kids.

cards.title: Pets as Siblings for Only Children
cards.body: Research shows pets play a critical role in only children's development. They teach important lessons about caring, empathy, and responsibility.

cards.title: Adolescents Need to Belong
cards.body: Cyberbullying's harmful effects include loneliness and disconnection that reflect deeper human needs. Understanding adolescents' need to belong helps address bullying's root causes.
